arts.ttl: The Battle of the Bridge, a nine-man high line and THAT Thomas Tuchel-Antonio Conte handshake... the craziest moments between Chelsea and Tottenham as rivals meet tonight
arts.sum: Prior to the game under the lights at Stamford Bridge, it's worth going down memory lane to see some of the craziest games and incidents between the two sides.

arts.ttl: Chelsea decided against signing player Enzo Maresca 'really wanted' last summer because he was too small - journalist
arts.sum: Certainly would have been an upgrade this season...

arts.ttl: 'When he does play': Jermain Defoe thinks Tottenham's £40m man is the most underrated in the Premier League
arts.sum: Jermain Defoe has just named one of Tottenham Hotspur’s best players as the Premier League’s most underrated player at this moment in time. Tottenham Hotspur...

arts.ttl: Expected Chelsea XI for Tottenham clash as Sancho dropped but Palmer returns
arts.sum: Cole Palmer, Noni Madueke and Nicolas Jackson are in contention to be named in the squad for the Blues, who are looking to take a huge step towards finishing in a Champions League place this season. Likewise, Madueke and Jackson both returned to training recently after facing longer spells on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted team vs Chelsea - Ange Postecoglou makes six changes with Micky van de Ven call - football.london
arts.sum: After two weekends without a game due to the international break and FA Cup quarter-finals taking place, there is a full midweek round of Premier League games on the calendar. Tottenham's record at Chelsea during the Premier League era is extremely poor to say the least and they will have to put in a big performance in SW6 to come away with all three points.

arts.ttl: Trincão backs Chelsea signing – Explains qualities Blues will get
arts.sum: Sporting Club de Portugal winger Trincão has heaped praise on Chelsea signing Geovany Quenda, detailing the qualities the Blues will be getting. O Jogo cover comments from the winger today discussing Quenda, who is set to join Chelsea on a permanent basis next year. arts.ttl: Nico Williams favourites 'revealed' amid £48.4m Arsenal, Barcelona, Chelsea transfer battle
arts.sum: The favourites to sign Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams are reportedly revealed amid links with Arsenal, Chelsea and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo shares how ‘crazy’ Chelsea fans helped them beat Tottenham last time ahead of Stamford Bridge clash
The reason why Chelsea and Manchester City fans will not be able to attend this year’s Club World Cup
arts.sum: The travel ban for certain Manchester City and Chelsea fans will also apply to away matches involving the England national team, the 2026 World Cup in the United States, and various UEFA competitions, both at club and national levels. This policy means that approximately 150 Manchester City and Chelsea fans will have to surrender their passports to the police, effectively preventing them from leaving the country and traveling to the United States.

arts.ttl: Report: How much Tottenham would now consider selling Dejan Kulusevski for with transfer decision made
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski has decided his future at Tottenham already 🚨
